data.title: Velan Inc. had a solid performance in Q3 FY2026: Sales $71.7M, Net Income $3.0M, Backlog $296.8M, Bookings $77.9M. CEO confirms strong future growth & sale agreement with Birch Hill Equity Partners Management Inc. to maximize shareholder value.
data.description: Velan Inc., a prominent industrial valves manufacturer, reported financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2026, ending November 30, 2025. Sales were $71.7 million, down from $73.4 million the previous year, while gross profit was $27.2 million, with a net income of $3.0 million. The company had a backlog of $296.8 million, up 8.0% since the start of the fiscal year, and bookings of $77.9 million for the quarter. Velan's net cash position was $20.2 million. Velan announced the proposed sale of 72.1% of outstanding shares to Birch Hill Equity Partners for C$203,922,040.80. Velan also disclosed significant transactions including the sale of French subsidiaries. The company expects a solid performance for fiscal 2026. The company will suspend dividend payments until the sale's closing. Velan's financial results demonstrated steady performance compared to the previous year.

data.title: Banyan Group surpasses milestone of 100 resorts, plans for continued growth and impact in 2026.
data.description: In the wake of a significant period of advancement and influence, the Group is embarking on the new year with a clear commitment to expanding its operations with a focus on sustainable travel. Based in Singapore, on January 15, 2026, Banyan Group, also known as Banyan Tree Holdings Limited and identified under the stock symbol SGX: B58, a prominent worldwide hospitality entity, is gearing up for purposeful growth and promoting regenerative tourism efforts.

data.title: Tech company plans to invest $200M in tokenized water projects in Asia. Experts foresee market growth to reach new heights by 2026.
data.description: Industry experts are forecasting a substantial growth of the tokenized real-world asset market in 2026, driven by increased adoption in emerging economies. This growth trajectory is projected to result in a significant increase in market value and trading volume, with some executives predicting a surge in activity reaching into the billions of dollars. This bullish outlook underscores the growing confidence in the potential of tokenized assets to revolutionize traditional finance and investment landscapes.

data.title: Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg calls for tougher penalties for crypto scams after targeting elderly New Yorkers' life savings.
data.description: Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg is pushing for legal consequences for cryptocurrency schemes, including a particular scam that has emptied the bank accounts of elderly residents in New York.

data.title: AI can unlock $4.5T in U.S. labor productivity, 93% of jobs affected, skilling and human judgment key.
data.description: A recent study by Cognizant reveals that the progression of artificial intelligence (AI) is exceeding earlier forecasts, as it has the potential to impact 93% of current jobs. Despite this, the report also emphasizes the limitations of AI's influence, highlighting the essential roles of upskilling and human decision-making in ensuring organizations can fully leverage the benefits of AI. The study was conducted in Teaneck, N.J. on January 15th.

data.title: IBM launched IBM Sovereign Core, the first AI-ready sovereign-enabled software for organizations. Jan. 15, 2026 /PRNewswire
data.description: IBM has introduced IBM Sovereign Core, a pioneering software designed for organizations to establish secure, compliant, and automated environments for AI-ready sovereign workloads. This new release is positioned as the first of its kind in the industry, tailored to facilitate such deployments. The announcement came from IBM's headquarters in ARMONK, N.Y. on January 15, 2026. IBM, identified on the New York Stock Exchange as IBM (NYSE: IBM), aims to provide advanced solutions for companies seeking to leverage AI in sovereign contexts.

data.title: Indigo sells 2.85M tonnes of carbon removal to Microsoft, supporting American farmers across millions of acres.
data.description: Indigo Carbon PBC has disclosed a massive soil carbon deal with Microsoft, spanning a 12-year agreement. Microsoft will be acquiring 2.85 million soil carbon removal credits from Indigo as part of the deal. This initiative aims to assist numerous American farmers managing millions of acres of land across the United States. The announcement was made on January 15, 2026, marking a significant step towards promoting sustainable practices in agriculture.

data.title: JCPenney introduces two new home collections in 2026; focuses on design, quality, and value for American families.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, JCPenney is heading into the year 2026 with a distinct focus: offering design-driven fashion, reliable quality, and exceptional value to the varied working families across America.

data.title: Atlas Ocean Voyages strengthens brand identity to lead in luxury expedition cruising, announced on Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: Atlas Ocean Voyages presents a new brand identity showcasing its commitment to personalized hospitality and meaningful human interactions on board its advanced expedition yachts. The company revealed the update on Jan. 14, 2026, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. Interested individuals can access related imagery through download.

data.title: Velan Inc. (TSX: VLN) reports solid Q3 performance ending November 30, 2025, as a leading industrial valve manufacturer.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Velan Inc. (TSX: VLN), a renowned industrial valves manufacturer based in Montreal, released its financial outcomes for the quarter ending on November 30, 2025. The company reported its figures in U.S. dollars unless specified differently.
